description: Mineral Morphus table. Percentile bands: 01-05% Amethyst Crystal, 06-10% Arsenic, 11-15% Clear Crystal/Quartz, 16-21% Crystalline Body, 22-26% Emerald/Tourmaline, 27-31% Gold, 32-34% Horns Spines or Spikes, 35-39% Iron Hematite, 40-44% Iron Magnetite, 45-51% Living Statue, 52-58% Metal Statue, 59-63% Orpiment, 64-69% Part Inorganic, 70-75% Part Inorganic with Weapons, 76-83% Rough Metal Body, 84-90% Rough Stone Body, 91-95% Silver, 96-00% Uraninite.

entries.name: Rough Metal Body
entries.description: The Nightbane looks as if he was made from lumps/clusters of metal or molten metal that cooled in lumps and streams like the surface of a partially melted candle[cite: 39]. Or he may look like crude, unprocessed metal ore with a rough surface dotted with tiny crystals and discoloration[cite: 40].
customOneOffs: The body is roughly human shaped, but large and heavy-set[cite: 41].
Impervious to cold (no damage) but takes double damage from fire[cite: 43].

entries.name: Metal Statue
entries.description: The Nightbane is shaped like a well-sculpted metallic humanoid[cite: 44]. The form is not unattractive, but unsettlingly inhuman[cite: 45].
customOneOffs: Since the Nightbane has a basically humanoid size and shape, he can hide his appearance under clothing and a hood or hat[cite: 45].
Impervious to cold (no damage) but takes double damage from fire[cite: 47].

entries.name: Rough Stone Body
entries.description: The Nightbane looks like he is made of roughly hewn blocks of stone[cite: 48].
customOneOffs: Resistant to fire and cold (takes half damage)[cite: 50].

entries.name: Living Statue
entries.description: A finely sculpted and detailed humanoid figure that looks normal except it is made of inorganic material (crystal, marble, ebony or stone)[cite: 51].
customOneOffs: Since the Nightbane has a basically humanoid size and shape, he can hide his appearance under clothing with a hood or a hat[cite: 52].
Resistant to fire and cold (takes half damage)[cite: 54].

entries.name: Part Inorganic
entries.description: The character has the hands and arms or chest and head of stone, crystal or metal, rough or highly polished[cite: 55]. In the alternative, large patches all over the body are made of crystals, stone or metal and look as if they are protruding through a thin covering of skin[cite: 56].
customOneOffs: If a leg is inorganic, reduce Spd by 10% (this is a GM/player call based on where the parts manifest)[cite: 55].

entries.name: Part Inorganic with Weapons
entries.description: The Nightbane's forearms and hands turn into stone, crystal or metal with a hand that is a sword or axe-like weapon or a hand that has long inorganic claws or knuckle spikes[cite: 58].
customOneOffs: The hands are resistant to cold, heat and fire (take half damage)[cite: 59].
Adds 2D6 to damage[cite: 59].

entries.name: Horns, Spines or Spikes
entries.description: The character's spine is covered in thick spines or spikes made of inorganic material, or has a crown of inorganic horns/spikes, or has 3D4 small spikes or spines all over[cite: 60].
customOneOffs: Adds an additional 1D6 damage when used as a weapon/in combat[cite: 61].

entries.name: Crystalline Body
entries.description: The body looks like it is made of crystal. The shape is not unattractive but very inhuman.
customOneOffs: The crystalline body has many sharp edges, and will tear through clothing after a few hours of wear and tear.
Laser resistant (half damage).
The hands are not as articulated and have trouble holding on to things, resulting in a -10% on all skills that require the use of hands[cite: 66, 67].
The crystalline hands and fingers act like claws, inflicting an additional 1D6 points of damage on punches.

entries.name: Amethyst Crystal
entries.description: The character appears to be a sleek humanoid composed of purple, translucent and prismatic amethyst crystal. Facial features are obscured as the face appears to have been cut from one or more giant gemstones.
customOneOffs: Among mages and healers, amethyst is said to have a property to improve powers of intuition.
All mineral Morphus forms make the character impervious to the vampire's bite and mind control.
Cannot swim; sinks like a rock.

entries.name: Arsenic
entries.description: Appears as a thick, bulky humanoid that seems to be made of living rock formed from hundreds of porous, metallic balls fused together, giving the surface a lumpy, bumpy texture; brownish-gray to gray in color.

poison.failDamageFormula: Anyone who eats the scraped arsenic suffers 3D6 damage direct to Hit Points[cite: 1074].

customOneOffs: A Nightbane made of arsenic is impervious to poison, +3 to save vs toxins and drugs, and resistant to fire and heat (does half damage).
All mineral Morphus forms make the character impervious to the vampire's bite and mind control.
Cannot swim; sinks like a rock.

When heated, the character exudes the smell of garlic which is repugnant to vampires, Wampyrs, were-beasts and select other supernatural beings, and holds them at bay for a 20 foot (6.1 m) radius around the Mineral Nightbane.
Clawing, biting and any attack by the Nightbane that cuts or stabs an opponent with the character's mineral body does the usual damage plus 2D6 damage from poison.
The 'Bane can scrape grains of arsenic off his body to use as ingested poison, typically mixed into food or drink.

entries.name: Emerald/Tourmaline
entries.description: The character appears to be a sleek humanoid composed of rich green, translucent emerald or tourmaline crystal. Facial features are obscured as the face appears to have been cut from one giant gemstone or made up of several.
customOneOffs: When the healing touch is used, the emerald hand glows as if there were a light inside the palm and radiates through the forearm.
All mineral Morphus forms make the character impervious to the vampire's bite and mind control.
Cannot swim; sinks like a rock.
Can heal others, restoring 4D6+6 S.D.C. or Hit Points twice per 24 hours, or completely negate poison (restoring all lost H.P./S.D.C. from poison)[cite: 1081, 1082].

entries.name: Gold
entries.description: Appears to be a man made of solid metallic gold. The body is sleek, smooth, lustrous gold. Facial features are smoothed out and unidentifiable.
customOneOffs: Bullets and projectiles become imbedded in the soft gold mineral, but can be easily plucked out without any additional damage.
A few minutes after being removed, the indentation smooths over to leave no mark/scar of any kind.
Fire and heat do full damage.
All mineral Morphus forms make the character impervious to the vampire's bite and mind control.
Cannot swim; sinks like a lead weight.
+6 to punch and kick damage (in addition to P.S. bonus).

entries.name: Orpiment
entries.description: Appears to be a man made of a rich lemon yellow, prismatic crystal that resembles amber with many fine fracture lines running through it. The body is sleek, chiseled, smooth, lustrous, facial features are smoothed out and unidentifiable/nondescript.
customOneOffs: A sulfide mineral, the Orpiment Morphus is impervious to the effects of stench and other powerful odors, and airborne toxins[cite: 1092, 1093].
All mineral Morphus forms make the character impervious to the vampire's bite and mind control.
Cannot swim; sinks like a rock.
Impervious to stench.

When heated, smells of garlic, which is repugnant to vampires, wampyres, werebeasts and select other supernatural beings, holding them at bay for a 20 foot (6.1 m) radius around the Mineral Nightbane.

entries.name: Iron: Hematite
entries.description: Appears to me made of smooth gray, black or brownish-red iron. Facial features are smoothed out and unidentifiable/nondescript.
customOneOffs: Bullets and projectiles bounce off the iron body.
The character can parry weapons and fiery torches with his bare hands.
All mineral Morphus forms make the character impervious to the vampire's bite and mind control.
Cannot swim; sinks like a rock.
+4 to punch and kick damage (in addition to P.S. bonus).

entries.name: Iron: Magnetite
entries.description: Appears to be a man made of either smooth, dark gray metal/iron or a grainy black rock with flecks of bronze crystals and/or streaks. Facial features are smoothed out and unidentifiable.
customOneOffs: Bullets and projectiles bounce off the iron body.
The character can parry weapons and fiery torches with his bare hands.
Any iron or steel weapon or object that touches his body is held fast to it and requires a P.S. of 24 or greater to pull it free.

The Nightbane can momentarily cancel the magnetic field to release any metal object attached to him, and can make any metal object within 6 feet (1.8 m) come to him, and one can be made to fly right into his hand (maximum weight 20 lbs/9 kg per object, and it must have sufficient iron/steel content).
The character can affix himself to iron/steel, enabling him to stand, walk and hold onto vehicles, boxcars, and even rockets or the hull of ships.
This enables him to scale such structures or affix himself to them with such force that a combined P.S. of 50 is necessary to pry him loose.
Always knows where north is located.
All mineral Morphus forms make the character impervious to the vampire's bite and mind control.
Cannot swim; sinks like a rock.
+3 to punch and kick damage (in addition to P.S. bonus).

entries.name: Silver
entries.description: Appears to be made of a sleek, lustrous, metallic silver. Facial features are smoothed out and unidentifiable.
customOneOffs: Bullets and projectiles bounce off his body, and the character can parry weapons with his bare hands.
Fire and heat do full damage.
Such beings (vampires/werebeasts) view him with apprehension and fear, giving the silver character +2 on initiative and +1 to strike, parry and disarm when battling such creatures.
All mineral Morphus forms make the character impervious to the vampire's bite and mind control.
Cannot swim; sinks like a rock.
+3 to punch and kick damage (in addition to P.S. bonus).
Punches, kicks and other attacks from a Nightbane made of silver inflict double damage to vampires, werebeasts and other beings vulnerable to silver.

entries.name: Clear Crystal/Quartz
entries.description: The character's body appears to be covered in clear, translucent crystal rods sticking out of his flesh, face and skull, or he may appear to be made entirely of cut, clear crystal. He may also have a crown, horns or mane of crystals on his head instead of hair, and the face is covered and distorted by crystals as to conceal his human identity.
customOneOffs: Resistant to fire and heat, and the character can parry weapons with his bare hands.
+2 to Horror Factor if rods stick out of flesh, +1 if made entirely of cut crystal.
Blunt and projectile attacks do full damage.
All mineral Morphus forms make the character impervious to the vampire's bite and mind control.
Cannot swim; sinks like a rock.
+3 to damage.
The Clear Crystal Morphus can see and attack Astral Beings, the clear crystals of his body able to inflict damage to Astral Being with punches, kicks, and any crystalline weapon.
Can form one crystalline weapon from his hand, typically a rod or sword-like weapon that does 2D6 damage[cite: 1125, 1126].
Does +1D6 to Astral Beings.

entries.name: Uraninite
entries.description: Appears as a normal sized humanoid that seems to be made of living rock formed from hundreds of granular habits/balls fused into stone, giving the surface a lumpy, bumpy texture; a dark, charred grey or black color with a few small specks of yellow that look like chip marks[cite: 1128, 1129]. Highly radioactive.
customOneOffs: Resistant to fire and heat (half damage) and can parry weapons and fiery torches with bare hands.
All mineral Morphus forms make the character impervious to the vampire's bite and mind control.
Cannot swim; sinks like a rock.
Impervious to radiation.
+4 to punch and kick damage (in addition to P.S. bonus).
No flame but radiates heat from the hands to inflict 2D6 damage per attack.
Can fire heat blast up to 20 feet (6.1 m) inflicting 2D6 damage.
